_comment: Template for config/ai_config.json. Copy this file to config/ai_config.json and edit for your machine. The real config is gitignored because it contains machine-specific paths (e.g. local Razhan CT2 model_path) that should never be committed. load_ai_config() in python/ai/provider.py falls back to built-in defaults if config/ai_config.json is missing, so the server will still start without it — but STT will fall back to a generic Whisper 'base' model instead of Razhan.
_ipa_comment: Tier 3 acoustic alignment: wav2vec2 is the ONLY IPA engine. The former text-based providers (local/epitran, openai, ollama) and the southern_kurdish_arabic_to_ipa fallback have been removed. The ipa block below is informational; the code path is hard-wired via ai.forced_align.Aligner to the model declared in the wav2vec2 block at the bottom of this file.

ortho._comment: Orthographic transcription (e.g. Kurdish Arabic script). ORTH now requires an explicit local CTranslate2 path. Convert razhan/whisper-base-sdh first (for example: ct2-transformers-converter --model razhan/whisper-base-sdh --output_dir /models/razhan-whisper-base-sdh-ct2) and point model_path at that local CT2 directory. HuggingFace repo ids are intentionally rejected so ORTH cannot silently fall back to the wrong model. The recommended ORTH defaults below are the current anti-cascade safety contract for long recordings: vad_filter=true with tuned Silero params, condition_on_previous_text=false, and compression_ratio_threshold=1.8. initial_prompt primes the Whisper decoder — useful on elicited word-list recordings. refine_lexemes=true enables a short-clip Whisper pass over every concept after Tier-2 forced alignment; adds ~1-2 min on thesis-scale audio but yields clean per-lexeme text in tiers.ortho_words even when the coarse ortho tier is monolithic.
